details.test: Task 1: Save beginner 15–25 min morning session to favorites
Task 2: Choose cheapest monthly plan with offline downloads under $25 and start checkout
Task 3: Build 3-session gentle weekly routine (10–20 minutes)
Task 4: Newsletter subscription with 3 topics and morning delivery
Task 5: Follow highest-experience mindful/restorative instructor with rating >= 4.6 and preview beginner class
Task 6: Save 2 recent anxiety and 1 recent sleep article to reading list
Task 7: Complete stress check-in and save suggested movement plan
Task 8: Configure 4-day reminder schedule with three daily alerts (in-app only)
Task 9: Submit corporate wellness inquiry for 200–300 employee company
